issue.title: [Bug] `pnpm typecheck` fails on packages/api after `better-sqlite3` upgrade
issue.body:
## Describe the bug

After upgrading `better-sqlite3` from 12.10.0 to 12.11.1 in `packages/db`, `pnpm typecheck` in `packages/api` fails with:

```
error TS2349: This expression is not callable.
  Type 'typeof import("better-sqlite3")' has no call signatures.
```

## To reproduce

```bash
pnpm install
pnpm --filter @electron-template/api typecheck
```

## Expected behavior

Typecheck passes.

## Actual behavior

Typecheck fails.

## Environment

- OS: macOS 14.4
- Node: 22.13.0
- pnpm: 9.0.0
- better-sqlite3: 12.11.1
